'''761''' was the designation of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] guarding a dam near [[Valleyport]] on [[Liinade III]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. He was stunned by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]].<ref name="X:Isard">''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
